title: Crispy Oxtail with Malaysian Caramel Sauce
description: A rich and flavorful dish featuring crispy oxtail and a sweet, sticky caramel sauce inspired by Malaysian cuisine.
instructions: In a large bowl, toss the oxtail pieces with 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil until coated. Season with salt and pepper.
Spread the oxtail pieces in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
While the oxtail is roasting, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the soy sauce, honey, fish sauce, and rice vinegar to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the sauce to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the roasted oxtail pieces to the skillet and toss to coat with the caramel sauce.
Serve the crispy oxtail with additional caramel sauce spooned over the top, if desired.
